title: WRAPT 10 BLUE KIDS BIRTHDAY INVITATIONS, Boys Party Invitations, Fill in the Name in the Star Birthday Party Invites Cards with Yellow Envelopes, 10 pack set
features: COLOURFUL AND FUN DESIGNS: These kids party invites come in a 10-pack and include vibrant and playful birthday invitations perfect for any boy.
SIZE A6 FORMAT: 148mm x 105mm; Lovely thick quality personalised party invitations. Fill in the party boys name in the star and fill-in-the-blank sections for quick and clear party details.
ENVELOPES INCLUDED: These birthday party invitations come with matching green envelopes, providing a complete and convenient solution for your kids party invitations.
ECO-FRIENDLY: Designed and printed in the UK with a low carbon footprint. Printed using sustainably sourced paper (FSC), inks & packaging.

WRAPT BY DEAR HENRY: At Wrapt, we believe that celebrating life's special moments should not come at the expense of our planet. That's why we've dedicated ourselves to creating beautiful, high-quality kids' party invitations & birthday cards, greeting cards and wrapping paper that are both stylish and sustainable. Every product we offer is thoughtfully designed with lots of love, care & attention, all whilst reducing our carbon footprint.
description: At Dear Henry we specialise in cards that meet the needs of busy family life. We have designed our notes to be fun for kids to fill in and give them a helping hand by adding feint lines to guide wobbly hand writing All Dear Henry card packs are made in the UK with lots of love, care & attention. These cards are printed on lovely thick quality paper and come with co-ordinating envelopes.
